overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway through an underpass and emerges into a vast downtown intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping walkway with red neon ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian arcade, passing by various pedestrians and shop fronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful outfit walking toward camera

entered.detail: elongated covered walkway with distinctive red neon ceiling lights and structural beams
large illuminated billboard displaying 'CIRRUS' brand advertisement with red and white text
modern building facade with geometric glass and steel framework
rectangular planters containing dense green shrubs lining the walkway
storefronts with illuminated signage and glass windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by intense red neon ceiling lights. The player walks forward past various NPC pedestrians and commercial shop fronts on the left, while a modern glass and steel structure rises on the right. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic, featuring glowing advertisements and reflective wet pavement.

events.description: exits the covered pedestrian walkway into open street environment
police cruiser with flashing lights drives past from right to left

agents.ego_description: stepping off the sidewalk and crossing the street while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: police cruiser driving past with emergency lights activated

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the street ahead
futuristic police car with glowing blue underlights and red emergency lights
storefront with vibrant purple neon signage and graffiti-style artwork

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway and transitions to an open street crossing beneath a massive urban overpass. A police cruiser with flashing lights drives past on the right. The environment shifts from enclosed red neon to open air with mixed street lighting, and a distinctive purple neon shop becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath highway overpass with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing pedestrians and observing the neon-lit shop fronts

entered.detail: underside of the concrete highway overpass with structural beams and dim lighting
towering futuristic high-rise buildings visible in the distance ahead
curved highway ramp structure with illuminated traffic

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive overpass structure, the scene is dominated by the purple glow of a neon shop facade on the left. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk with the overpass ceiling overhead, while distant skyscrapers become visible ahead. The environment feels urban and slightly claustrophobic despite the wide street.

scene_state.functional_zone: large downtown intersection with towering skyscrapers

events.description: emerges from under the overpass into the expansive open downtown area
slows and stops at the intersection, panning to view the surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, slowing down to observe the massive scale of the surrounding architecture and neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: several cars driving through the intersection on the green light

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow striped markings
large illuminated advertising screens displaying various brand messages

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the underpass into a vast open intersection dominated by towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and massive digital billboards. The camera stops at the yellow crosswalk, panning to take in the scale of the downtown architecture, elevated highway ramps, and moderate vehicle traffic flowing through the intersection. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed to overwhelmingly open and vertical.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit corridor into the overwhelming verticality of a futuristic downtown intersection. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway bathed in intense red neon, moving past commercial shop fronts and reflective wet pavement. As the camera exits the enclosure, the scene transitions to an open street crossing beneath a massive urban overpass, where the lighting shifts from red to a mix of street lamps and the purple glow of a nearby shop facade. The camera continues forward under the heavy concrete ceiling of the overpass, maintaining a sense of urban confinement before finally emerging into a vast open plaza. The shot concludes at a yellow crosswalk, panning upward to reveal towering skyscrapers, massive digital billboards, and elevated highway ramps that dominate the nighttime skyline.
